name: structure-viewer
description: Open and inspect molecular structure files in an interactive Mol* viewer.

interface.longDescription: Molecular Structure Viewer helps you open and inspect PDB, CIF, mmCIF, MOL, and SDF files directly in Codex. Explore an interactive Mol* view, inspect experiment metadata, focus ligands, select author-numbered chains or residue sets, calculate coordinate-derived contacts and distances, change representations and display options through chat, and ask follow-up questions grounded in the current viewer state.
defaultPrompt: Open this structure, identify the likely ligand, and show residues within 4 angstroms
Open this structure and measure the closest-heavy-atom distance between two residues
Open this structure in the side pane and color it by B-factor or confidence
